summary: Iteration 52 - Release Calendar feature testing complete. All backend endpoints working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Calendar page renders with month navigation, day grid, industry dates on Tuesdays/Fridays, Add Event modal with all fields, sidebar panels for selected date events, upcoming countdowns, and industry dates info.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/calendar/events?month=4&year=2026 returns events array with industry dates
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events without params uses current month
Backend: POST /api/calendar/events creates custom event with title, date, type, color, notes, reminder
Backend: POST /api/calendar/events with minimal data (title and date only) uses defaults
Backend: Create event and verify it appears in calendar events list
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/events/{event_id} removes custom event
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/events/{event_id} returns 404 for nonexistent event
Backend: GET /api/calendar/upcoming returns upcoming array sorted by date
Backend: Create future event and verify it appears in upcoming with days_until
Backend: Industry dates appear on correct days (Friday for New Music Friday, Tuesday for Spotify/Apple)
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/calendar/events without auth returns 401
Frontend: /calendar page renders with 'Release Calendar' title
Frontend: Month title shows 'April 2026' with prev/next navigation buttons
Frontend: Calendar grid shows 30 day cells for April
Frontend: Industry dates visible on Tuesdays (Spotify/Apple deadlines) and Fridays (New Music Friday)
Frontend: Add Event button opens modal with title, date, type, color picker (7 colors), notes, reminder fields
Frontend: Calendar sidebar has 'Calendar' nav item with CalendarBlank icon
Frontend: Clicking a day cell shows events for that date in sidebar panel
Frontend: Upcoming panel shows countdown for future events
Frontend: Industry Dates info panel visible in right sidebar with color legend
seed_data_creation: None - clean database with only admin@kalmori.com. Test events created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 tested Release Calendar feature. All calendar CRUD endpoints working. Industry dates are dynamically generated for each month (New Music Friday on Fridays, Spotify/Apple deadlines on Tuesdays). Custom events stored in calendar_events collection. No release dates exist since DB was wiped. Calendar page fully functional with month navigation, event creation modal, day selection, upcoming countdowns, and industry dates info panel.

endpoints.GET /api/calendar/events: Returns events array with releases, custom events, and dynamically generated industry dates for the requested month
endpoints.POST /api/calendar/events: Creates custom event with title, date, event_type, color, notes, reminder
endpoints.GET /api/calendar/upcoming: Returns upcoming events sorted by date with days_until countdown

frontend_features.day_grid: 7-column grid with day cells showing events
frontend_features.industry_dates: Auto-generated on Tuesdays (Spotify/Apple) and Fridays (New Music Friday)
frontend_features.add_event_modal: Title, date picker, type selector, 7-color picker, notes textarea, reminder checkbox
frontend_features.selected_date_panel: Shows events for clicked day with delete option for custom events
frontend_features.upcoming_panel: Shows countdown in days for future events
frontend_features.industry_info_panel: Explains industry date schedule with color legend
